case_title: THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY, INC. VS. DERYLE ADAMS et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT - LEASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY, INC.
REFUND/REIMBURSEMENT OF $43.40 RE 19192 FOR TRANSACTION W2504203R227 (RENT DEPOSIT), PAYABLE TO THE JOHN STEWART CO., PRSP04001311-05, WARRANT #02610414, DATED MAR-05-2004
